free_text: Depolarization in proton inclusive inelastic
scattering and in the(d,p) reaction on medium-weight
nuclei
Polarization of inelastically
scattered protons was measured with a high pressure
- 14.6 atm helium polarimeter. Protons scattered to
left and right were detected with telescopes, each
consisting of two proportional counters and a silicon
detector.
PArticles identified by a counter telescope
